title: ProjoStack
description: A multi-tenant workspace management platform — Manage workspaces, projects, tasks, and team members with role-based access control. Features workspace invitations, task assignments, and project tracking across multiple organizations.

title: HouseKonekt
description: A property listing and tenant-landlord communication platform — Landlords post apartments with details and images. Tenants browse listings, filter by location/price, and chat directly with landlords to streamline the house-hunting process.

title: Malibaze
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform — Complete online store with product catalog, shopping cart, user authentication, order management, and payment processing.
